state.last_action: explored armor shop near Mudwich river
state.notes: Reached level 5 in session 1. Key finding: 't' key re-attacks last target and is very effective for grinding. Trees get targeted by mistake (Oak). WORLD says 'must equip axe to cut trees'. Found armor shop (blue building) near river east of Mudwich. Loitering skill level 4 from walking. Strength level 3+ from combat. Other players seen: Guest4253, Guest4257 (said hello). HP pools: L1=69, L2=69, L3=69, L4=99, L5=99. Combat tip: use t-key to re-engage after each kill, works even when visual targeting shows wrong entity.
